description: Represent gravity, material, rigid-body, constraint, force, time, agent, and render-physics bridge controls as typed replayable fields.
physical_assumptions: Physical behavior should be controlled through structured fields, not hidden prompt prose.
Each control should have a value, source, confidence, and deterministic replay semantics when generated by an LLM.
Matched replay changes one physical parameter while locking seed, camera, action, and initial state.
verifier_rules: Required physics_control fields are present and typed.
Runtime control echo matches the case spec.
Single-parameter sweeps produce directionally predictable trajectory/contact changes.
repair_suggestions: Add expected invariant ranges for every swept parameter.
Do not change camera/action/initial state during sensitivity tests.
